response.overview: Recorded live at Moonstar Studio in Bangkok on 25 October 2008, the concert captures Thai rock band Retrospect performing during the promotion of their second album Rise. The show features an energetic set of the band’s post-hardcore and alternative rock songs, highlighting their growing popularity in Thailand’s rock scene. Throughout the performance, the band delivers a high-intensity live experience with guest appearances from several Thai artists and strong interaction with their dedicated fanbase, the “Retrorians.” The concert showcases Retrospect at a pivotal moment as they transition from underground act to a major presence in Thai rock.
response.title: Retrospect Rise Now! Concert
